{{Quote|Behold the divine Princess Nampi of Orooturoo, infidel numps!|Nampi's guard|<ref name="Jabba the Hutt: The Hunger of Princess Nampi">''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Hunger of Princess Nampi]]''</ref>}}
'''Nampi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] of a [[Unidentified Orooturoo species|species native]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Orooturoo]].

==Biography==
[[File:NampiDeath.jpg|thumb|left|The death of Nampi.]]

Nampi trapped [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] and his crew aboard a [[Nuffin]] [[Nuffin freighter|freighter]] she owned. Nampi ate Jabba's top aide, [[Scuppa]], to take him as her husband, as Orooturooan mating rituals involved the female eating the male. However, Jabba had put an explosive inside Scuppa's head to use if he betrayed Jabba. When Nampi ate Scuppa, Jabba set off the explosive, which caused Nampi to gruesomely explode. After Nampi's death, Jabba took her [[Freighter/Legends|starship]] to [[Cabrool Nuum]] and tried to give it to him.

==Personality and traits==
Nampi had deep<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|358-359|Nampi}}</ref> [[Color/Legends|purple]] skin and red [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="Encyclopedia" />
